functions.description: Replace SDL's memory allocation functions with a custom set.
functions.syntax:
bool SDL_SetMemoryFunctions(SDL_malloc_func malloc_func,
 SDL_calloc_func calloc_func,
 SDL_realloc_func realloc_func,
 SDL_free_func free_func);

parameters.name: malloc_func
parameters.description: custom malloc function.

parameters.name: calloc_func
parameters.description: custom calloc function.

parameters.name: realloc_func
parameters.description: custom realloc function.

parameters.name: free_func
parameters.description: custom free function.

functions.returns: (bool) Returns true on success or false on failure; call SDL_GetError () for more information.
remarks:
It is not safe to call this function once any allocations have been
made, as future calls to SDL_free will use
the new allocator, even if they came from an SDL_malloc made with the old one!

If used, usually this needs to be the first call made into the SDL
library, if not the very first thing done at program startup time.
functions.threadSafety:
It is safe to call this function from any thread, but one should not
replace the memory functions once any allocations are made!
functions.version: This function is available since SDL 3.2.0.

impose modifier key states on your application. Simply pass your desired
modifier states into modstate . This value may be a bitwise,

Set a pointer property in a group of properties with a cleanup
function that is called when the property is deleted.
functions.syntax: bool SDL_SetPointerPropertyWithCleanup(SDL_PropertiesID props, const char *name, void *value, SDL_CleanupPropertyCallback cleanup, void *userdata);

parameters.name: props
parameters.description: the properties to modify.

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: the name of the property to modify.

parameters.name: value
parameters.description: the new value of the property, or NULL to delete the property.

parameters.name: cleanup
parameters.description:
the function to call when this property is deleted, or NULL if no
cleanup is necessary.

parameters.name: userdata
parameters.description: a pointer that is passed to the cleanup function.

functions.returns: (bool) Returns true on success or false on failure; call SDL_GetError () for more information.
remarks:
The cleanup function is also called if setting the property fails for
any reason.

For simply setting basic data types, like numbers, bools, or strings,
use SDL_SetNumberProperty , SDL_SetBooleanProperty , or SDL_SetStringProperty instead, as
those functions will handle cleanup on your behalf. This function is
only for more complex, custom data.
functions.threadSafety: It is safe to call this function from any thread.
functions.version: This function is available since SDL 3.2.0.

functions.name: SDL_SetPrimarySelectionText
functions.packageDescription: النواة الأساسية لـ SDL3 وتشمل إدارة النافذة والإدخال والأحداث والصوت والربط مع واجهات الرسوميات مثل Vulkan.
functions.description: Put UTF-8 text into the primary selection.

functions.returns: (bool) Returns true on success or false on failure; call SDL_GetError () for more information.
functions.threadSafety: This function should only be called on the main thread.
functions.version: This function is available since SDL 3.2.0.

functions.name: SDL_SetRelativeMouseTransform
functions.packageDescription: النواة الأساسية لـ SDL3 وتشمل إدارة النافذة والإدخال والأحداث والصوت والربط مع واجهات الرسوميات مثل Vulkan.

inputs.

parameters.description:
a callback used to transform relative mouse motion, or NULL for
default behavior.

parameters.name: userdata
parameters.description: a pointer that will be passed to callback .

functions.returns: (bool) Returns true on success or false on failure; call SDL_GetError () for more information.
remarks:
This overrides the relative system scale and relative speed scale
hints. Should be called prior to enabling relative mouse mode, fails
otherwise.

functions.version: This function is available since SDL 3.4.0.

functions.returns: (bool) Returns true on success or false on failure; call SDL_GetError () for more information.
remarks:
Each render target has its own clip rectangle. This function sets the

functions.threadSafety: This function should only be called on the main thread.
functions.version: This function is available since SDL 3.2.0.

functions.name: SDL_SetRenderColorScale
functions.packageDescription: النواة الأساسية لـ SDL3 وتشمل إدارة النافذة والإدخال والأحداث والصوت والربط مع واجهات الرسوميات مثل Vulkan.
functions.description: Set the color scale used for render operations.

parameters.name: renderer
parameters.description: the rendering context.

parameters.name: scale
parameters.description: the color scale value.

functions.returns: (bool) Returns true on success or false on failure; call SDL_GetError () for more information.
remarks:
The color scale is an additional scale multiplied into the pixel
color value while rendering. This can be used to adjust the brightness
of colors during HDR rendering, or changing HDR video brightness when
playing on an SDR display.

The color scale does not affect the alpha channel, only the color
brightness.
functions.threadSafety: This function should only be called on the main thread.
functions.version: This function is available since SDL 3.2.0.

functions.name: SDL_SetRenderDrawBlendMode
functions.packageDescription: النواة الأساسية لـ SDL3 وتشمل إدارة النافذة والإدخال والأحداث والصوت والربط مع واجهات الرسوميات مثل Vulkan.
functions.description: Set the blend mode used for drawing operations (Fill and Line).

parameters.name: renderer
parameters.description: the rendering context.

parameters.name: blendMode
parameters.description:
the SDL_BlendMode to use for
blending.

functions.returns: (bool) Returns true on success or false on failure; call SDL_GetError () for more information.
remarks:
If the blend mode is not supported, the closest supported mode is
chosen.
functions.threadSafety: This function should only be called on the main thread.
functions.version: This function is available since SDL 3.2.0.

functions.name: SDL_SetRenderDrawColor
functions.packageDescription: النواة الأساسية لـ SDL3 وتشمل إدارة النافذة والإدخال والأحداث والصوت والربط مع واجهات الرسوميات مثل Vulkan.
functions.description: Set the color used for drawing operations.
functions.syntax: bool SDL_SetRenderDrawColor(SDL_Renderer *renderer, Uint8 r, Uint8 g, Uint8 b, Uint8 a);

parameters.name: renderer
parameters.description: the rendering context.

parameters.name: r
parameters.description: the red value used to draw on the rendering target.

parameters.name: g
parameters.description: the green value used to draw on the rendering target.

parameters.name: b
parameters.description: the blue value used to draw on the rendering target.

parameters.name: a
parameters.description:
the alpha value used to draw on the rendering target; usually SDL_ALPHA_OPAQUE (255).
Use SDL_SetRenderDrawBlendMode to
specify how the alpha channel is used.

functions.returns: (bool) Returns true on success or false on failure; call SDL_GetError () for more information.
remarks:
Set the color for drawing or filling rectangles, lines, and points,
and for SDL_RenderClear ().
functions.threadSafety: This function should only be called on the main thread.
functions.version: This function is available since SDL 3.2.0.

functions.name: SDL_SetRenderDrawColorFloat
functions.packageDescription: النواة الأساسية لـ SDL3 وتشمل إدارة النافذة والإدخال والأحداث والصوت والربط مع واجهات الرسوميات مثل Vulkan.
functions.description: Set the color used for drawing operations (Rect, Line and Clear).
functions.syntax: bool SDL_SetRenderDrawColorFloat(SDL_Renderer *renderer, float r, float g, float b, float a);

parameters.name: renderer
parameters.description: the rendering context.

parameters.name: r
parameters.description: the red value used to draw on the rendering target.

parameters.name: g
parameters.description: the green value used to draw on the rendering target.

parameters.name: b
parameters.description: the blue value used to draw on the rendering target.

parameters.name: a
parameters.description:
the alpha value used to draw on the rendering target. Use SDL_SetRenderDrawBlendMode to
specify how the alpha channel is used.

functions.returns: (bool) Returns true on success or false on failure; call SDL_GetError () for more information.
remarks:
Set the color for drawing or filling rectangles, lines, and points,
and for SDL_RenderClear ().
functions.threadSafety: This function should only be called on the main thread.
functions.version: This function is available since SDL 3.2.0.

functions.name: SDL_SetRenderLogicalPresentation
functions.packageDescription: النواة الأساسية لـ SDL3 وتشمل إدارة النافذة والإدخال والأحداث والصوت والربط مع واجهات الرسوميات مثل Vulkan.
functions.description:
Set a device-independent resolution and presentation mode for
rendering.
functions.syntax: bool SDL_SetRenderLogicalPresentation(SDL_Renderer *renderer, int w, int h, SDL_RendererLogicalPresentation mode);

parameters.name: renderer
parameters.description: the rendering context.

parameters.name: w
parameters.description: the width of the logical resolution.

parameters.name: h
parameters.description: the height of the logical resolution.

parameters.name: mode
parameters.description: the presentation mode used.

functions.returns: (bool) Returns true on success or false on failure; call SDL_GetError () for more information.
remarks:
This function sets the width and height of the logical rendering
output. The renderer will act as if the current render target is always
the requested dimensions, scaling to the actual resolution as
necessary.

This can be useful for games that expect a fixed size, but would like
to scale the output to whatever is available, regardless of how a user
resizes a window, or if the display is high DPI.

Logical presentation can be used with both render target textures and
the renderer's window; the state is unique to each render target, and
this function sets the state for the current render target. It might be
useful to draw to a texture that matches the window dimensions with
logical presentation enabled, and then draw that texture across the
entire window with logical presentation disabled. Be careful not to
render both with logical presentation enabled, however, as this could
produce double-letterboxing, etc.

You can disable logical coordinates by setting the mode to SDL_LOGICAL_PRESENTATION_DISABLED ,
and in that case you get the full pixel resolution of the render target;
it is safe to toggle logical presentation during the rendering of a
frame: perhaps most of the rendering is done to specific dimensions but
to make fonts look sharp, the app turns off logical presentation while
drawing text, for example.

You can convert coordinates in an event into rendering coordinates
using SDL_ConvertEventToRenderCoordinates ().
functions.threadSafety: This function should only be called on the main thread.
functions.version: This function is available since SDL 3.2.0.

functions.name: SDL_SetRenderScale
functions.packageDescription: النواة الأساسية لـ SDL3 وتشمل إدارة النافذة والإدخال والأحداث والصوت والربط مع واجهات الرسوميات مثل Vulkan.
functions.description: Set the drawing scale for rendering on the current target.
functions.syntax: bool SDL_SetRenderScale(SDL_Renderer *renderer, float scaleX, float scaleY);

parameters.name: renderer
parameters.description: the rendering context.

parameters.name: scaleX
parameters.description: the horizontal scaling factor.

parameters.name: scaleY
parameters.description: the vertical scaling factor.

functions.returns: (bool) Returns true on success or false on failure; call SDL_GetError () for more information.
remarks:
The drawing coordinates are scaled by the x/y scaling factors before
they are used by the renderer. This allows resolution independent
drawing with a single coordinate system.

If this results in scaling or subpixel drawing by the rendering
backend, it will be handled using the appropriate quality hints. For
best results use integer scaling factors.

Each render target has its own scale. This function sets the scale
for the current render target.
functions.threadSafety: This function should only be called on the main thread.
functions.version: This function is available since SDL 3.2.0.

functions.name: SDL_SetRenderTarget
functions.packageDescription: النواة الأساسية لـ SDL3 وتشمل إدارة النافذة والإدخال والأحداث والصوت والربط مع واجهات الرسوميات مثل Vulkan.
functions.description: Set a texture as the current rendering target.

parameters.name: renderer
parameters.description: the rendering context.

parameters.name: texture
parameters.description:
the targeted texture, which must be created with the SDL_TEXTUREACCESS_TARGET
flag, or NULL to render to the window instead of a texture.

functions.returns: (bool) Returns true on success or false on failure; call SDL_GetError () for more information.
remarks:
The default render target is the window for which the renderer was
created. To stop rendering to a texture and render to the window again,
call this function with a NULL texture .

Viewport, cliprect, scale, and logical presentation are unique to
each render target. Get and set functions for these states apply to the
current render target set by this function, and those states persist on
each target when the current render target changes.
functions.threadSafety: This function should only be called on the main thread.
functions.version: This function is available since SDL 3.2.0.

functions.name: SDL_SetRenderTextureAddressMode
functions.packageDescription: النواة الأساسية لـ SDL3 وتشمل إدارة النافذة والإدخال والأحداث والصوت والربط مع واجهات الرسوميات مثل Vulkan.
functions.description: Set the texture addressing mode used in SDL_RenderGeometry ().

parameters.name: renderer
parameters.description: the rendering context.

parameters.name: u_mode
parameters.description:
the SDL_TextureAddressMode
to use for horizontal texture coordinates in SDL_RenderGeometry ().

parameters.name: v_mode
parameters.description:
the SDL_TextureAddressMode
to use for vertical texture coordinates in SDL_RenderGeometry ().

functions.returns: (bool) Returns true on success or false on failure; call SDL_GetError () for more information.
functions.threadSafety: This function should only be called on the main thread.
functions.version: This function is available since SDL 3.4.0.

functions.name: SDL_SetRenderViewport
functions.packageDescription: النواة الأساسية لـ SDL3 وتشمل إدارة النافذة والإدخال والأحداث والصوت والربط مع واجهات الرسوميات مثل Vulkan.
functions.description: Set the drawing area for rendering on the current target.

parameters.name: renderer
parameters.description: the rendering context.

parameters.name: rect
parameters.description:
the SDL_Rect structure representing the
drawing area, or NULL to set the viewport to the entire target.

functions.returns: (bool) Returns true on success or false on failure; call SDL_GetError () for more information.
remarks:
Drawing will clip to this area (separately from any clipping done
with SDL_SetRenderClipRect ),
and the top left of the area will become coordinate (0, 0) for future
drawing commands.
The area's width and height must be >= 0.

Each render target has its own viewport. This function sets the
viewport for the current render target.
functions.threadSafety: This function should only be called on the main thread.
functions.version: This function is available since SDL 3.2.0.

functions.name: SDL_SetRenderVSync
functions.packageDescription: النواة الأساسية لـ SDL3 وتشمل إدارة النافذة والإدخال والأحداث والصوت والربط مع واجهات الرسوميات مثل Vulkan.
functions.description: Toggle VSync of the given renderer.

parameters.name: renderer
parameters.description: the renderer to toggle.

parameters.name: vsync
parameters.description: the vertical refresh sync interval.

functions.returns: (bool) Returns true on success or false on failure; call SDL_GetError () for more information.
remarks: When a renderer is created, vsync defaults to SDL_RENDERER_VSYNC_DISABLED .

The vsync parameter can be 1 to synchronize present with
every vertical refresh, 2 to synchronize present with every second
vertical refresh, etc., SDL_RENDERER_VSYNC_ADAPTIVE
for late swap tearing (adaptive vsync), or SDL_RENDERER_VSYNC_DISABLED
to disable. Not every value is supported by every driver, so you should
check the return value to see whether the requested setting is
supported.
functions.threadSafety: This function should only be called on the main thread.
functions.version: This function is available since SDL 3.2.0.

functions.name: SDL_SetScancodeName
functions.packageDescription: النواة الأساسية لـ SDL3 وتشمل إدارة النافذة والإدخال والأحداث والصوت والربط مع واجهات الرسوميات مثل Vulkan.
functions.description: Set a human-readable name for a scancode.

parameters.name: scancode
parameters.description: the desired SDL_Scancode .

parameters.name: name
parameters.description:
the name to use for the scancode, encoded as UTF-8. The string is
not copied, so the pointer given to this function must stay valid while
SDL is being used.

functions.returns: (bool) Returns true on success or false on failure; call SDL_GetError () for more information.
functions.threadSafety: This function is not thread safe.
functions.version: This function is available since SDL 3.2.0.

functions.name: SDL_SetStringProperty
functions.packageDescription: النواة الأساسية لـ SDL3 وتشمل إدارة النافذة والإدخال والأحداث والصوت والربط مع واجهات الرسوميات مثل Vulkan.
functions.description: Set a string property in a group of properties.
functions.syntax: bool SDL_SetStringProperty(SDL_PropertiesID props, const char *name, const char *value);

parameters.name: props
parameters.description: the properties to modify.

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: the name of the property to modify.

parameters.name: value
parameters.description: the new value of the property, or NULL to delete the property.

functions.returns: (bool) Returns true on success or false on failure; call SDL_GetError () for more information.
remarks:
This function makes a copy of the string; the caller does not have to
preserve the data after this call completes.
functions.threadSafety: It is safe to call this function from any thread.
functions.version: This function is available since SDL 3.2.0.

functions.name: SDL_SetSurfaceAlphaMod
functions.packageDescription: النواة الأساسية لـ SDL3 وتشمل إدارة النافذة والإدخال والأحداث والصوت والربط مع واجهات الرسوميات مثل Vulkan.
functions.description: Set an additional alpha value used in blit operations.

parameters.name: surface
parameters.description:
the SDL_Surface structure to
update.

parameters.name: alpha
parameters.description: the alpha value multiplied into blit operations.

functions.returns: (bool) Returns true on success or false on failure; call SDL_GetError () for more information.
remarks:
When this surface is blitted, during the blit operation the source
alpha value is modulated by this alpha value according to the following
formula:
srcA = srcA * (alpha / 255)
functions.threadSafety:
This function can be called on different threads with different
surfaces.
functions.version: This function is available since SDL 3.2.0.

functions.name: SDL_SetSurfaceBlendMode
functions.packageDescription: النواة الأساسية لـ SDL3 وتشمل إدارة النافذة والإدخال والأحداث والصوت والربط مع واجهات الرسوميات مثل Vulkan.
functions.description: Set the blend mode used for blit operations.

parameters.name: surface
parameters.description:
the SDL_Surface structure to
update.

parameters.name: blendMode
parameters.description:
the SDL_BlendMode to use for blit
blending.

functions.returns: (bool) Returns true on success or false on failure; call SDL_GetError () for more information.
remarks:
To copy a surface to another surface (or texture) without blending
with the existing data, the blendmode of the SOURCE surface should be
set to SDL_BLENDMODE_NONE .
functions.threadSafety:
This function can be called on different threads with different
surfaces.
functions.version: This function is available since SDL 3.2.0.

functions.name: SDL_SetSurfaceClipRect
functions.packageDescription: النواة الأساسية لـ SDL3 وتشمل إدارة النافذة والإدخال والأحداث والصوت والربط مع واجهات الرسوميات مثل Vulkan.
functions.description: Set the clipping rectangle for a surface.

parameters.name: surface
parameters.description:
the SDL_Surface structure to be
clipped.

parameters.name: rect
parameters.description:
the SDL_Rect structure representing the
clipping rectangle, or NULL to disable clipping.

functions.returns:
(bool) Returns true if the rectangle intersects the surface,
otherwise false and blits will be completely clipped.
remarks:
When surface is the destination of a blit, only the area
within the clip rectangle is drawn into.

Note that blits are automatically clipped to the edges of the source
and destination surfaces.
functions.threadSafety:
This function can be called on different threads with different
surfaces.
functions.version: This function is available since SDL 3.2.0.

functions.name: SDL_SetSurfaceColorKey
functions.packageDescription: النواة الأساسية لـ SDL3 وتشمل إدارة النافذة والإدخال والأحداث والصوت والربط مع واجهات الرسوميات مثل Vulkan.
functions.description: Set the color key (transparent pixel) in a surface.
functions.syntax: bool SDL_SetSurfaceColorKey(SDL_Surface *surface, bool enabled, Uint32 key);

parameters.name: surface
parameters.description:
the SDL_Surface structure to
update.

parameters.name: enabled
parameters.description: true to enable color key, false to disable color key.

parameters.name: key
parameters.description: the transparent pixel.

functions.returns: (bool) Returns true on success or false on failure; call SDL_GetError () for more information.
remarks:
The color key defines a pixel value that will be treated as
transparent in a blit. For example, one can use this to specify that
cyan pixels should be considered transparent, and therefore not
rendered.
It is a pixel of the format used by the surface, as generated by SDL_MapRGB ().
functions.threadSafety:
This function can be called on different threads with different
surfaces.
functions.version: This function is available since SDL 3.2.0.

functions.name: SDL_SetSurfaceColorMod
functions.packageDescription: النواة الأساسية لـ SDL3 وتشمل إدارة النافذة والإدخال والأحداث والصوت والربط مع واجهات الرسوميات مثل Vulkan.
functions.description: Set an additional color value multiplied into blit operations.
functions.syntax: bool SDL_SetSurfaceColorMod(SDL_Surface *surface, Uint8 r, Uint8 g, Uint8 b);

parameters.name: surface
parameters.description:
the SDL_Surface structure to
update.

parameters.name: r
parameters.description: the red color value multiplied into blit operations.

parameters.name: g
parameters.description: the green color value multiplied into blit operations.

parameters.name: b
parameters.description: the blue color value multiplied into blit operations.

functions.returns: (bool) Returns true on success or false on failure; call SDL_GetError () for more information.
remarks:
When this surface is blitted, during the blit operation each source
color channel is modulated by the appropriate color value according to
the following formula:
srcC = srcC * (color / 255)
functions.threadSafety:
This function can be called on different threads with different
surfaces.
functions.version: This function is available since SDL 3.2.0.

functions.name: SDL_SetSurfaceColorspace
functions.packageDescription: النواة الأساسية لـ SDL3 وتشمل إدارة النافذة والإدخال والأحداث والصوت والربط مع واجهات الرسوميات مثل Vulkan.
functions.description: Set the colorspace used by a surface.

parameters.name: surface
parameters.description:
the SDL_Surface structure to
update.

parameters.name: colorspace
parameters.description:
an SDL_Colorspace value describing
the surface colorspace.

functions.returns: (bool) Returns true on success or false on failure; call SDL_GetError () for more information.
remarks:
Setting the colorspace doesn't change the pixels, only how they are
interpreted in color operations.
functions.threadSafety:
This function can be called on different threads with different
surfaces.
functions.version: This function is available since SDL 3.2.0.

functions.name: SDL_SetSurfacePalette
functions.packageDescription: النواة الأساسية لـ SDL3 وتشمل إدارة النافذة والإدخال والأحداث والصوت والربط مع واجهات الرسوميات مثل Vulkan.
functions.description: Set the palette used by a surface.

parameters.name: surface
parameters.description:
the SDL_Surface structure to
update.

parameters.name: palette
parameters.description:
the SDL_Palette structure to
use.

functions.returns: (bool) Returns true on success or false on failure; call SDL_GetError () for more information.
remarks:
Setting the palette keeps an internal reference to the palette, which
can be safely destroyed afterwards.
A single palette can be shared with many surfaces.
functions.threadSafety:
This function can be called on different threads with different
surfaces.
functions.version: This function is available since SDL 3.2.0.

functions.name: SDL_SetSurfaceRLE
functions.packageDescription: النواة الأساسية لـ SDL3 وتشمل إدارة النافذة والإدخال والأحداث والصوت والربط مع واجهات الرسوميات مثل Vulkan.
functions.description: Set the RLE acceleration hint for a surface.

parameters.name: surface
parameters.description:
the SDL_Surface structure to
optimize.

parameters.name: enabled
parameters.description: true to enable RLE acceleration, false to disable it.

functions.returns: (bool) Returns true on success or false on failure; call SDL_GetError () for more information.
remarks:
If RLE is enabled, color key and alpha blending blits are much
faster, but the surface must be locked before directly accessing the
pixels.
functions.threadSafety:
This function can be called on different threads with different
surfaces.
functions.version: This function is available since SDL 3.2.0.

functions.name: SDL_SetTextInputArea
functions.packageDescription: النواة الأساسية لـ SDL3 وتشمل إدارة النافذة والإدخال والأحداث والصوت والربط مع واجهات الرسوميات مثل Vulkan.
functions.description: Set the area used to type Unicode text input.
functions.syntax: bool SDL_SetTextInputArea(SDL_Window *window, const SDL_Rect *rect, int cursor);

parameters.name: window
parameters.description: the window for which to set the text input area.

parameters.name: rect
parameters.description:
the SDL_Rect representing the text input
area, in window coordinates, or NULL to clear it.

parameters.name: cursor
parameters.description:
the offset of the current cursor location relative to
 rect->x , in window coordinates.

functions.returns: (bool) Returns true on success or false on failure; call SDL_GetError () for more information.
remarks:
Native input methods may place a window with word suggestions near
the cursor, without covering the text being entered.
functions.threadSafety: This function should only be called on the main thread.
functions.version: This function is available since SDL 3.2.0.

functions.name: SDL_SetTextureAlphaMod
functions.packageDescription: النواة الأساسية لـ SDL3 وتشمل إدارة النافذة والإدخال والأحداث والصوت والربط مع واجهات الرسوميات مثل Vulkan.
functions.description:
Set an additional alpha value multiplied into render copy
operations.

parameters.name: texture
parameters.description: the texture to update.

parameters.name: alpha
parameters.description: the source alpha value multiplied into copy operations.

functions.returns: (bool) Returns true on success or false on failure; call SDL_GetError () for more information.
remarks:
When this texture is rendered, during the copy operation the source
alpha value is modulated by this alpha value according to the following
formula:
srcA = srcA * (alpha / 255)

Alpha modulation is not always supported by the renderer; it will
return false if alpha modulation is not supported.
functions.threadSafety: This function should only be called on the main thread.
functions.version: This function is available since SDL 3.2.0.

functions.name: SDL_SetTextureAlphaModFloat
functions.packageDescription: النواة الأساسية لـ SDL3 وتشمل إدارة النافذة والإدخال والأحداث والصوت والربط مع واجهات الرسوميات مثل Vulkan.
functions.description:
Set an additional alpha value multiplied into render copy
operations.

parameters.name: texture
parameters.description: the texture to update.

parameters.name: alpha
parameters.description: the source alpha value multiplied into copy operations.

functions.returns: (bool) Returns true on success or false on failure; call SDL_GetError () for more information.
remarks:
When this texture is rendered, during the copy operation the source
alpha value is modulated by this alpha value according to the following
formula:
srcA = srcA * alpha

Alpha modulation is not always supported by the renderer; it will
return false if alpha modulation is not supported.
functions.threadSafety: This function should only be called on the main thread.
functions.version: This function is available since SDL 3.2.0.

functions.name: SDL_SetTextureBlendMode
functions.packageDescription: النواة الأساسية لـ SDL3 وتشمل إدارة النافذة والإدخال والأحداث والصوت والربط مع واجهات الرسوميات مثل Vulkan.
functions.description: Set the blend mode for a texture, used by SDL_RenderTexture ().

parameters.name: texture

parameters.name: blendMode
parameters.description:
the SDL_BlendMode to use for
texture blending.

functions.returns: (bool) Returns true on success or false on failure; call SDL_GetError () for more information.
remarks:
If the blend mode is not supported, the closest supported mode is
chosen and this function returns false.
functions.threadSafety: This function should only be called on the main thread.
functions.version: This function is available since SDL 3.2.0.

functions.name: SDL_SetTextureColorMod
functions.packageDescription: النواة الأساسية لـ SDL3 وتشمل إدارة النافذة والإدخال والأحداث والصوت والربط مع واجهات الرسوميات مثل Vulkan.
functions.description:
Set an additional color value multiplied into render copy
operations.
functions.syntax: bool SDL_SetTextureColorMod(SDL_Texture *texture, Uint8 r, Uint8 g, Uint8 b);

parameters.name: texture
parameters.description: the texture to update.

parameters.name: r
parameters.description: the red color value multiplied into copy operations.

parameters.name: g
parameters.description: the green color value multiplied into copy operations.

parameters.name: b
parameters.description: the blue color value multiplied into copy operations.

functions.returns: (bool) Returns true on success or false on failure; call SDL_GetError () for more information.
remarks:
When this texture is rendered, during the copy operation each source
color channel is modulated by the appropriate color value according to
the following formula:
srcC = srcC * (color / 255)

Color modulation is not always supported by the renderer; it will
return false if color modulation is not supported.
functions.threadSafety: This function should only be called on the main thread.
functions.version: This function is available since SDL 3.2.0.

functions.packageDescription: النواة الأساسية لـ SDL3 وتشمل إدارة النافذة والإدخال والأحداث والصوت والربط مع واجهات الرسوميات مثل Vulkan.
functions.description:
Set an additional color value multiplied into render copy
operations.

parameters.name: texture
parameters.description: the texture to update.

parameters.name: r
parameters.description: the red color value multiplied into copy operations.

parameters.name: g
parameters.description: the green color value multiplied into copy operations.

parameters.name: b
parameters.description: the blue color value multiplied into copy operations.

functions.returns: (bool) Returns true on success or false on failure; call SDL_GetError () for more information.
remarks:
When this texture is rendered, during the copy operation each source
color channel is modulated by the appropriate color value according to
the following formula:
srcC = srcC * color

Color modulation is not always supported by the renderer; it will
return false if color modulation is not supported.
functions.threadSafety: This function should only be called on the main thread.
functions.version: This function is available since SDL 3.2.0.

functions.name: SDL_SetTLS
functions.packageDescription: النواة الأساسية لـ SDL3 وتشمل إدارة النافذة والإدخال والأحداث والصوت والربط مع واجهات الرسوميات مثل Vulkan.
functions.description:
Set the current thread's value associated with a thread local storage
ID.
functions.syntax: bool SDL_SetTLS(SDL_TLSID *id, const void *value, SDL_TLSDestructorCallback destructor);

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: a pointer to the thread local storage ID, may not be NULL.

parameters.name: value
parameters.description: the value to associate with the ID for the current thread.

parameters.name: destructor
parameters.description:
a function called when the thread exits, to free the value, may be
NULL.

functions.returns: (bool) Returns true on success or false on failure; call SDL_GetError () for more information.
remarks:
If the thread local storage ID is not initialized (the value is 0), a
new ID will be created in a thread-safe way, so all calls using a
pointer to the same ID will refer to the same local storage.

Note that replacing a value from a previous call to this function on
the same thread does not call the previous value's
destructor!

destructor can be NULL; it is assumed that
 value does not need to be cleaned up if so.
functions.threadSafety: It is safe to call this function from any thread.
functions.version: This function is available since SDL 3.2.0.

an optional pointer to pass extra data to the callback when it will

This function should be called on the thread that created the

functions.name: SDL_SetTrayEntryLabel

remarks:

functions.description: Set the window to always be above the others.

parameters.name: window
parameters.description: the window of which to change the always on top state.

parameters.name: on_top

functions.returns: (bool) Returns true on success or false on failure; call SDL_GetError () for more information.
remarks:
This will add or remove the window's SDL_WINDOW_ALWAYS_ON_TOP
flag. This will bring the window to the front and keep the window above
the rest.
functions.threadSafety: This function should only be called on the main thread.
functions.version: This function is available since SDL 3.2.0.

functions.name: SDL_SetWindowAspectRatio
functions.packageDescription: النواة الأساسية لـ SDL3 وتشمل إدارة النافذة والإدخال والأحداث والصوت والربط مع واجهات الرسوميات مثل Vulkan.
functions.description: Request that the aspect ratio of a window's client area be set.
functions.syntax: bool SDL_SetWindowAspectRatio(SDL_Window *window, float min_aspect, float max_aspect);

parameters.name: window
parameters.description: the window to change.

parameters.name: min_aspect
parameters.description: the minimum aspect ratio of the window, or 0.0f for no limit.

parameters.name: max_aspect
parameters.description: the maximum aspect ratio of the window, or 0.0f for no limit.

functions.returns: (bool) Returns true on success or false on failure; call SDL_GetError () for more information.
remarks:
The aspect ratio is the ratio of width divided by height, e.g.
2560x1600 would be 1.6. Larger aspect ratios are wider and smaller
aspect ratios are narrower.

If, at the time of this request, the window in a fixed-size state,
such as maximized or fullscreen, the request will be deferred until the
window exits this state and becomes resizable again.

On some windowing systems, this request is asynchronous and the new
window aspect ratio may not have have been applied immediately upon the
return of this function. If an immediate change is required, call SDL_SyncWindow () to block until the
changes have taken effect.

When the window size changes, an SDL_EVENT_WINDOW_RESIZED event
will be emitted with the new window dimensions. Note that the new
dimensions may not match the exact aspect ratio requested, as some
windowing systems can restrict the window size in certain scenarios
(e.g. constraining the size of the content area to remain within the
usable desktop bounds). Additionally, as this is just a request, it can
be denied by the windowing system.
functions.threadSafety: This function should only be called on the main thread.
functions.version: This function is available since SDL 3.2.0.

functions.name: SDL_SetWindowBordered
functions.packageDescription: النواة الأساسية لـ SDL3 وتشمل إدارة النافذة والإدخال والأحداث والصوت والربط مع واجهات الرسوميات مثل Vulkan.
functions.description: Set the border state of a window.

parameters.name: window
parameters.description: the window of which to change the border state.

parameters.name: bordered
parameters.description: false to remove border, true to add border.

functions.returns: (bool) Returns true on success or false on failure; call SDL_GetError () for more information.
remarks:
This will add or remove the window's SDL_WINDOW_BORDERLESS
flag and add or remove the border from the actual window. This is a
no-op if the window's border already matches the requested state.
You can't change the border state of a fullscreen window.
functions.threadSafety: This function should only be called on the main thread.
functions.version: This function is available since SDL 3.2.0.

functions.name: SDL_SetWindowFillDocument
functions.packageDescription: النواة الأساسية لـ SDL3 وتشمل إدارة النافذة والإدخال والأحداث والصوت والربط مع واجهات الرسوميات مثل Vulkan.
functions.description:
Set the window to fill the current document space (Emscripten
only).

parameters.name: window
parameters.description: the window of which to change the fill-document state.

parameters.name: fill
parameters.description: true to set the window to fill the document, false to disable.

functions.returns: (bool) Returns true on success or false on failure; call SDL_GetError () for more information.
remarks:
This will add or remove the window's SDL_WINDOW_FILL_DOCUMENT
flag.
Currently this flag only applies to the Emscripten target.

When enabled, the canvas element fills the entire document. Resize
events will be generated as the browser window is resized, as that will
adjust the canvas size as well. The canvas will cover anything else on
the page, including any controls provided by Emscripten in its generated
HTML file (in fact, any elements on the page that aren't the canvas will
be moved into a hidden div element).

Often times this is desirable for a browser-based game, but it means
several things that we expect of an SDL window on other platforms might
not work as expected, such as minimum window sizes and aspect
ratios.
functions.threadSafety: This function should only be called on the main thread.
functions.version: This function is available since SDL 3.4.0.

functions.name: SDL_SetWindowFocusable
functions.packageDescription: النواة الأساسية لـ SDL3 وتشمل إدارة النافذة والإدخال والأحداث والصوت والربط مع واجهات الرسوميات مثل Vulkan.
functions.description: Set whether the window may have input focus.

parameters.name: window
parameters.description: the window to set focusable state.

parameters.name: focusable
parameters.description: true to allow input focus, false to not allow input focus.

functions.returns: (bool) Returns true on success or false on failure; call SDL_GetError () for more information.
functions.threadSafety: This function should only be called on the main thread.
functions.version: This function is available since SDL 3.2.0.

functions.name: SDL_SetWindowFullscreen
functions.packageDescription: النواة الأساسية لـ SDL3 وتشمل إدارة النافذة والإدخال والأحداث والصوت والربط مع واجهات الرسوميات مثل Vulkan.
functions.description: Request that the window's fullscreen state be changed.

parameters.name: window
parameters.description: the window to change.

parameters.name: fullscreen
parameters.description: true for fullscreen mode, false for windowed mode.

functions.returns: (bool) Returns true on success or false on failure; call SDL_GetError () for more information.
remarks:
By default a window in fullscreen state uses borderless fullscreen
desktop mode, but a specific exclusive display mode can be set using SDL_SetWindowFullscreenMode ().

On some windowing systems this request is asynchronous and the new
fullscreen state may not have have been applied immediately upon the
return of this function. If an immediate change is required, call SDL_SyncWindow () to block until the
changes have taken effect.

When the window state changes, an SDL_EVENT_WINDOW_ENTER_FULLSCREEN
or SDL_EVENT_WINDOW_LEAVE_FULLSCREEN
event will be emitted. Note that, as this is just a request, it can be
denied by the windowing system.
functions.threadSafety: This function should only be called on the main thread.
functions.version: This function is available since SDL 3.2.0.

functions.name: SDL_SetWindowFullscreenMode
functions.packageDescription: النواة الأساسية لـ SDL3 وتشمل إدارة النافذة والإدخال والأحداث والصوت والربط مع واجهات الرسوميات مثل Vulkan.
functions.description:
Set the display mode to use when a window is visible and
fullscreen.

parameters.name: window
parameters.description: the window to affect.

parameters.name: mode
parameters.description:
a pointer to the display mode to use, which can be NULL for
borderless fullscreen desktop mode, or one of the fullscreen modes
returned by SDL_GetFullscreenDisplayModes ()
to set an exclusive fullscreen mode.

functions.returns: (bool) Returns true on success or false on failure; call SDL_GetError () for more information.
remarks:
This only affects the display mode used when the window is
fullscreen. To change the window size when the window is not fullscreen,
use SDL_SetWindowSize ().

If the window is currently in the fullscreen state, this request is
asynchronous on some windowing systems and the new mode dimensions may
not be applied immediately upon the return of this function. If an
immediate change is required, call SDL_SyncWindow () to block until the
changes have taken effect.

When the new mode takes effect, an SDL_EVENT_WINDOW_RESIZED and/or
an SDL_EVENT_WINDOW_PIXEL_SIZE_CHANGED
event will be emitted with the new mode dimensions.
functions.threadSafety: This function should only be called on the main thread.
functions.version: This function is available since SDL 3.2.0.

functions.name: SDL_SetWindowHitTest
functions.packageDescription: النواة الأساسية لـ SDL3 وتشمل إدارة النافذة والإدخال والأحداث والصوت والربط مع واجهات الرسوميات مثل Vulkan.
functions.description:
Provide a callback that decides if a window region has special
properties.

parameters.name: window
parameters.description: the window to set hit-testing on.

parameters.name: callback
parameters.description: the function to call when doing a hit-test.

parameters.name: callback_data
parameters.description:
an app-defined void pointer passed to
 callback .

functions.returns: (bool) Returns true on success or false on failure; call SDL_GetError () for more information.
remarks:
Normally windows are dragged and resized by decorations provided by
the system window manager (a title bar, borders, etc), but for some
apps, it makes sense to drag them from somewhere else inside the window
itself; for example, one might have a borderless window that wants to be
draggable from any part, or simulate its own title bar, etc.

This function lets the app provide a callback that designates pieces
of a given window as special. This callback is run during event
processing if we need to tell the OS to treat a region of the window
specially; the use of this callback is known as "hit testing."

Mouse input may not be delivered to your application if it is within
a special area; the OS will often apply that input to moving the window
or resizing the window and not deliver it to the application.

Specifying NULL for a callback disables hit-testing. Hit-testing is
disabled by default.

Platforms that don't support this functionality will return false
unconditionally, even if you're attempting to disable hit-testing.

Your callback may fire at any time, and its firing does not indicate
any specific behavior (for example, on Windows, this certainly might
fire when the OS is deciding whether to drag your window, but it fires
for lots of other reasons, too, some unrelated to anything you probably
care about and when the mouse isn't actually at the location it is
testing ). Since this can fire at any time, you should try to keep
your callback efficient, devoid of allocations, etc.
functions.threadSafety: This function should only be called on the main thread.
functions.version: This function is available since SDL 3.2.0.

functions.name: SDL_SetWindowIcon
functions.packageDescription: النواة الأساسية لـ SDL3 وتشمل إدارة النافذة والإدخال والأحداث والصوت والربط مع واجهات الرسوميات مثل Vulkan.
functions.description: Set the icon for a window.

parameters.name: window
parameters.description: the window to change.

parameters.name: icon
parameters.description:
an SDL_Surface structure containing
the icon for the window.

functions.returns: (bool) Returns true on success or false on failure; call SDL_GetError () for more information.
remarks:
If this function is passed a surface with alternate representations
added using SDL_AddSurfaceAlternateImage (),
the surface will be interpreted as the content to be used for 100%
display scale, and the alternate representations will be used for high
DPI situations. For example, if the original surface is 32x32, then on a
2x macOS display or 200% display scale on Windows, a 64x64 version of
the image will be used, if available. If a matching version of the image
isn't available, the closest larger size image will be downscaled to the
appropriate size and be used instead, if available. Otherwise, the
closest smaller image will be upscaled and be used instead.
functions.threadSafety: This function should only be called on the main thread.
functions.version: This function is available since SDL 3.2.0.

functions.name: SDL_SetWindowKeyboardGrab
functions.packageDescription: النواة الأساسية لـ SDL3 وتشمل إدارة النافذة والإدخال والأحداث والصوت والربط مع واجهات الرسوميات مثل Vulkan.
functions.description: Set a window's keyboard grab mode.

parameters.name: window
parameters.description: the window for which the keyboard grab mode should be set.

parameters.name: grabbed
parameters.description: this is true to grab keyboard, and false to release.

functions.returns: (bool) Returns true on success or false on failure; call SDL_GetError () for more information.
remarks:
Keyboard grab enables capture of system keyboard shortcuts like
Alt+Tab or the Meta/Super key. Note that not all system keyboard
shortcuts can be captured by applications (one example is Ctrl+Alt+Del
on Windows).

This is primarily intended for specialized applications such as VNC
clients or VM frontends. Normal games should not use keyboard grab.

When keyboard grab is enabled, SDL will continue to handle Alt+Tab
when the window is full-screen to ensure the user is not trapped in your
application. If you have a custom keyboard shortcut to exit fullscreen
mode, you may suppress this behavior with SDL_HINT_ALLOW_ALT_TAB_WHILE_GRABBED .

If the caller enables a grab while another window is currently
grabbed, the other window loses its grab in favor of the caller's
window.
functions.threadSafety: This function should only be called on the main thread.
functions.version: This function is available since SDL 3.2.0.

functions.name: SDL_SetWindowMaximumSize
functions.packageDescription: النواة الأساسية لـ SDL3 وتشمل إدارة النافذة والإدخال والأحداث والصوت والربط مع واجهات الرسوميات مثل Vulkan.

parameters.name: max_w

parameters.name: max_h

functions.returns: (bool) Returns true on success or false on failure; call SDL_GetError () for more information.
functions.threadSafety: This function should only be called on the main thread.
functions.version: This function is available since SDL 3.2.0.

functions.name: SDL_SetWindowMinimumSize
functions.packageDescription: النواة الأساسية لـ SDL3 وتشمل إدارة النافذة والإدخال والأحداث والصوت والربط مع واجهات الرسوميات مثل Vulkan.
functions.description: Set the minimum size of a window's client area.
functions.syntax: bool SDL_SetWindowMinimumSize(SDL_Window *window, int min_w, int min_h);

parameters.name: window
parameters.description: the window to change.

parameters.name: min_w
parameters.description: the minimum width of the window, or 0 for no limit.

parameters.name: min_h
parameters.description: the minimum height of the window, or 0 for no limit.

functions.returns: (bool) Returns true on success or false on failure; call SDL_GetError () for more information.
functions.threadSafety: This function should only be called on the main thread.
functions.version: This function is available since SDL 3.2.0.

functions.name: SDL_SetWindowModal
functions.packageDescription: النواة الأساسية لـ SDL3 وتشمل إدارة النافذة والإدخال والأحداث والصوت والربط مع واجهات الرسوميات مثل Vulkan.
functions.description: Toggle the state of the window as modal.

parameters.name: window
parameters.description: the window on which to set the modal state.

parameters.name: modal
parameters.description: true to toggle modal status on, false to toggle it off.

functions.returns: (bool) Returns true on success or false on failure; call SDL_GetError () for more information.
remarks:
To enable modal status on a window, the window must currently be the
child window of a parent, or toggling modal status on will fail.
functions.threadSafety: This function should only be called on the main thread.
functions.version: This function is available since SDL 3.2.0.

functions.name: SDL_SetWindowMouseGrab
functions.packageDescription: النواة الأساسية لـ SDL3 وتشمل إدارة النافذة والإدخال والأحداث والصوت والربط مع واجهات الرسوميات مثل Vulkan.
functions.description: Set a window's mouse grab mode.

parameters.name: window
parameters.description: the window for which the mouse grab mode should be set.

parameters.name: grabbed
parameters.description: this is true to grab mouse, and false to release.

functions.returns: (bool) Returns true on success or false on failure; call SDL_GetError () for more information.
remarks: Mouse grab confines the mouse cursor to the window.
functions.threadSafety: This function should only be called on the main thread.
functions.version: This function is available since SDL 3.2.0.

functions.name: SDL_SetWindowMouseRect
functions.packageDescription: النواة الأساسية لـ SDL3 وتشمل إدارة النافذة والإدخال والأحداث والصوت والربط مع واجهات الرسوميات مثل Vulkan.
functions.description: Confines the cursor to the specified area of a window.

parameters.name: window
parameters.description: the window that will be associated with the barrier.

parameters.name: rect
parameters.description:
a rectangle area in window-relative coordinates. If NULL the barrier
for the specified window will be destroyed.

functions.returns: (bool) Returns true on success or false on failure; call SDL_GetError () for more information.
remarks:
Note that this does NOT grab the cursor, it only defines the area a
cursor is restricted to when the window has mouse focus.
functions.threadSafety: This function should only be called on the main thread.
functions.version: This function is available since SDL 3.2.0.

functions.name: SDL_SetWindowOpacity
functions.packageDescription: النواة الأساسية لـ SDL3 وتشمل إدارة النافذة والإدخال والأحداث والصوت والربط مع واجهات الرسوميات مثل Vulkan.
functions.description: Set the opacity for a window.

parameters.name: window
parameters.description: the window which will be made transparent or opaque.

parameters.name: opacity
parameters.description: the opacity value (0.0f - transparent, 1.0f - opaque).

functions.returns: (bool) Returns true on success or false on failure; call SDL_GetError () for more information.
remarks:
The parameter opacity will be clamped internally between
0.0f (transparent) and 1.0f (opaque).

This function also returns false if setting the opacity isn't
supported.
functions.threadSafety: This function should only be called on the main thread.
functions.version: This function is available since SDL 3.2.0.

functions.name: SDL_SetWindowParent
functions.packageDescription: النواة الأساسية لـ SDL3 وتشمل إدارة النافذة والإدخال والأحداث والصوت والربط مع واجهات الرسوميات مثل Vulkan.
functions.description: Set the window as a child of a parent window.

parameters.name: window
parameters.description: the window that should become the child of a parent.

parameters.name: parent
parameters.description: the new parent window for the child window.

functions.returns: (bool) Returns true on success or false on failure; call SDL_GetError () for more information.
remarks:
If the window is already the child of an existing window, it will be
reparented to the new owner. Setting the parent window to NULL unparents
the window and removes child window status.

If a parent window is hidden or destroyed, the operation will be
recursively applied to child windows. Child windows hidden with the
parent that did not have their hidden status explicitly set will be
restored when the parent is shown.

Attempting to set the parent of a window that is currently in the
modal state will fail. Use SDL_SetWindowModal () to cancel the
modal status before attempting to change the parent.

Popup windows cannot change parents and attempts to do so will
fail.

Setting a parent window that is currently the sibling or descendent
of the child window results in undefined behavior.
functions.threadSafety: This function should only be called on the main thread.
functions.version: This function is available since SDL 3.2.0.

functions.name: SDL_SetWindowPosition
functions.packageDescription: النواة الأساسية لـ SDL3 وتشمل إدارة النافذة والإدخال والأحداث والصوت والربط مع واجهات الرسوميات مثل Vulkan.
functions.description: Request that the window's position be set.
functions.syntax: bool SDL_SetWindowPosition(SDL_Window *window, int x, int y);

parameters.name: window
parameters.description: the window to reposition.

parameters.name: x
parameters.description:
the x coordinate of the window, or SDL_WINDOWPOS_CENTERED
or SDL_WINDOWPOS_UNDEFINED .

parameters.name: y
parameters.description:
the y coordinate of the window, or SDL_WINDOWPOS_CENTERED
or SDL_WINDOWPOS_UNDEFINED .

functions.returns: (bool) Returns true on success or false on failure; call SDL_GetError () for more information.
remarks:
If the window is in an exclusive fullscreen or maximized state, this
request has no effect.

This can be used to reposition fullscreen-desktop windows onto a
different display, however, as exclusive fullscreen windows are locked
to a specific display, they can only be repositioned programmatically
via SDL_SetWindowFullscreenMode ().

On some windowing systems this request is asynchronous and the new
coordinates may not have have been applied immediately upon the return
of this function. If an immediate change is required, call SDL_SyncWindow () to block until the
changes have taken effect.

When the window position changes, an SDL_EVENT_WINDOW_MOVED event will
be emitted with the window's new coordinates. Note that the new
coordinates may not match the exact coordinates requested, as some
windowing systems can restrict the position of the window in certain
scenarios (e.g. constraining the position so the window is always within
desktop bounds). Additionally, as this is just a request, it can be
denied by the windowing system.
functions.threadSafety: This function should only be called on the main thread.
functions.version: This function is available since SDL 3.2.0.

functions.name: SDL_SetWindowProgressState
functions.packageDescription: النواة الأساسية لـ SDL3 وتشمل إدارة النافذة والإدخال والأحداث والصوت والربط مع واجهات الرسوميات مثل Vulkan.
functions.description:
Sets the state of the progress bar for the given window’s taskbar
icon.

parameters.name: window
parameters.description: the window whose progress state is to be modified.

parameters.name: state
parameters.description:
the progress state. SDL_PROGRESS_STATE_NONE
stops displaying the progress bar.

functions.returns: (bool) Returns true on success or false on failure; call SDL_GetError () for more information.
functions.threadSafety: This function should only be called on the main thread.
functions.version: This function is available since SDL 3.4.0.

functions.name: SDL_SetWindowProgressValue
functions.packageDescription: النواة الأساسية لـ SDL3 وتشمل إدارة النافذة والإدخال والأحداث والصوت والربط مع واجهات الرسوميات مثل Vulkan.
functions.description:
Sets the value of the progress bar for the given window’s taskbar
icon.

parameters.name: window
parameters.description: the window whose progress value is to be modified.

parameters.name: value
parameters.description:
the progress value in the range of [0.0f - 1.0f]. If the value is
outside the valid range, it gets clamped.

functions.returns: (bool) Returns true on success or false on failure; call SDL_GetError () for more information.
functions.threadSafety: This function should only be called on the main thread.
functions.version: This function is available since SDL 3.4.0.

functions.name: SDL_SetWindowRelativeMouseMode
functions.packageDescription: النواة الأساسية لـ SDL3 وتشمل إدارة النافذة والإدخال والأحداث والصوت والربط مع واجهات الرسوميات مثل Vulkan.
functions.description: Set relative mouse mode for a window.

parameters.name: window
parameters.description: the window to change.

parameters.name: enabled
parameters.description: true to enable relative mode, false to disable.

functions.returns: (bool) Returns true on success or false on failure; call SDL_GetError () for more information.
remarks:
While the window has focus and relative mouse mode is enabled, the
cursor is hidden, the mouse position is constrained to the window, and
SDL will report continuous relative mouse motion even if the mouse is at
the edge of the window.

If you'd like to keep the mouse position fixed while in relative mode
you can use SDL_SetWindowMouseRect (). If
you'd like the cursor to be at a specific location when relative mode
ends, you should use SDL_WarpMouseInWindow () before
disabling relative mode.

This function will flush any pending mouse motion for this
window.
functions.threadSafety: This function should only be called on the main thread.
functions.version: This function is available since SDL 3.2.0.

functions.name: SDL_SetWindowResizable
functions.packageDescription: النواة الأساسية لـ SDL3 وتشمل إدارة النافذة والإدخال والأحداث والصوت والربط مع واجهات الرسوميات مثل Vulkan.
functions.description: Set the user-resizable state of a window.

parameters.name: window
parameters.description: the window of which to change the resizable state.

parameters.name: resizable
parameters.description: true to allow resizing, false to disallow.

functions.returns: (bool) Returns true on success or false on failure; call SDL_GetError () for more information.
remarks:
This will add or remove the window's SDL_WINDOW_RESIZABLE
flag and allow/disallow user resizing of the window. This is a no-op if
the window's resizable state already matches the requested state.
You can't change the resizable state of a fullscreen window.
functions.threadSafety: This function should only be called on the main thread.
functions.version: This function is available since SDL 3.2.0.

functions.name: SDL_SetWindowShape
functions.packageDescription: النواة الأساسية لـ SDL3 وتشمل إدارة النافذة والإدخال والأحداث والصوت والربط مع واجهات الرسوميات مثل Vulkan.
functions.description: Set the shape of a transparent window.

parameters.name: window
parameters.description: the window.

parameters.name: shape
parameters.description:
the surface representing the shape of the window, or NULL to remove
any current shape.

functions.returns: (bool) Returns true on success or false on failure; call SDL_GetError () for more information.
remarks:
This sets the alpha channel of a transparent window and any fully
transparent areas are also transparent to mouse clicks. If you are using
something besides the SDL render API, then you are responsible for
drawing the alpha channel of the window to match the shape alpha channel
to get consistent cross-platform results.

The shape is copied inside this function, so you can free it
afterwards. If your shape surface changes, you should call SDL_SetWindowShape () again to update
the window. This is an expensive operation, so should be done
sparingly.
The window must have been created with the SDL_WINDOW_TRANSPARENT flag.
functions.threadSafety: This function should only be called on the main thread.
functions.version: This function is available since SDL 3.2.0.

functions.name: SDL_SetWindowSize
functions.packageDescription: النواة الأساسية لـ SDL3 وتشمل إدارة النافذة والإدخال والأحداث والصوت والربط مع واجهات الرسوميات مثل Vulkan.
functions.description: Request that the size of a window's client area be set.
functions.syntax: bool SDL_SetWindowSize(SDL_Window *window, int w, int h);

parameters.name: window
parameters.description: the window to change.

parameters.name: w
parameters.description: the width of the window, must be > 0.

parameters.name: h
parameters.description: the height of the window, must be > 0.

functions.returns: (bool) Returns true on success or false on failure; call SDL_GetError () for more information.
remarks:
If the window is in a fullscreen or maximized state, this request has
no effect.
To change the exclusive fullscreen mode of a window, use SDL_SetWindowFullscreenMode ().

On some windowing systems, this request is asynchronous and the new
window size may not have have been applied immediately upon the return
of this function. If an immediate change is required, call SDL_SyncWindow () to block until the
changes have taken effect.

When the window size changes, an SDL_EVENT_WINDOW_RESIZED event
will be emitted with the new window dimensions. Note that the new
dimensions may not match the exact size requested, as some windowing
systems can restrict the window size in certain scenarios (e.g.
constraining the size of the content area to remain within the usable
desktop bounds). Additionally, as this is just a request, it can be
denied by the windowing system.
functions.threadSafety: This function should only be called on the main thread.
functions.version: This function is available since SDL 3.2.0.

functions.name: SDL_SetWindowsMessageHook
functions.packageDescription: النواة الأساسية لـ SDL3 وتشمل إدارة النافذة والإدخال والأحداث والصوت والربط مع واجهات الرسوميات مثل Vulkan.
functions.description:
Set a callback for every Windows message, run before
TranslateMessage().

parameters.name: callback
parameters.description:
the SDL_WindowsMessageHook
function to call.

parameters.name: userdata
parameters.description: a pointer to pass to every iteration of callback .

remarks:
The callback may modify the message, and should return true if the
message should continue to be processed, or false to prevent further
processing.
functions.threadSafety: This function should only be called on the main thread.
functions.version: This function is available since SDL 3.2.0.

functions.name: SDL_SetWindowSurfaceVSync
functions.packageDescription: النواة الأساسية لـ SDL3 وتشمل إدارة النافذة والإدخال والأحداث والصوت والربط مع واجهات الرسوميات مثل Vulkan.
functions.description: Toggle VSync for the window surface.

parameters.name: window
parameters.description: the window.

parameters.name: vsync
parameters.description: the vertical refresh sync interval.

functions.returns: (bool) Returns true on success or false on failure; call SDL_GetError () for more information.
remarks: When a window surface is created, vsync defaults to SDL_WINDOW_SURFACE_VSYNC_DISABLED .

The vsync parameter can be 1 to synchronize present with
every vertical refresh, 2 to synchronize present with every second
vertical refresh, etc., SDL_WINDOW_SURFACE_VSYNC_ADAPTIVE
for late swap tearing (adaptive vsync), or SDL_WINDOW_SURFACE_VSYNC_DISABLED
to disable. Not every value is supported by every driver, so you should
check the return value to see whether the requested setting is
supported.
functions.threadSafety: This function should only be called on the main thread.
functions.version: This function is available since SDL 3.2.0.

functions.name: SDL_SetWindowTitle
functions.packageDescription: النواة الأساسية لـ SDL3 وتشمل إدارة النافذة والإدخال والأحداث والصوت والربط مع واجهات الرسوميات مثل Vulkan.
functions.description: Set the title of a window.

parameters.name: window
parameters.description: the window to change.

parameters.name: title

functions.returns: (bool) Returns true on success or false on failure; call SDL_GetError () for more information.
remarks: This string is expected to be in UTF-8 encoding.
functions.threadSafety: This function should only be called on the main thread.
functions.version: This function is available since SDL 3.2.0.

functions.name: SDL_SetX11EventHook
functions.packageDescription: النواة الأساسية لـ SDL3 وتشمل إدارة النافذة والإدخال والأحداث والصوت والربط مع واجهات الرسوميات مثل Vulkan.

remarks:

functions.name: SDL_ShouldInit
functions.packageDescription: النواة الأساسية لـ SDL3 وتشمل إدارة النافذة والإدخال والأحداث والصوت والربط مع واجهات الرسوميات مثل Vulkan.
functions.description: Return whether initialization should be done.

parameters.name: state
parameters.description: the initialization state to check.

functions.returns:
(bool) Returns true if initialization needs to be done, false
otherwise.
remarks:
This function checks the passed in state and if initialization should
be done, sets the status to SDL_INIT_STATUS_INITIALIZING
and returns true. If another thread is already modifying this state, it
will wait until that's done before returning.

If this function returns true, the calling code must call SDL_SetInitialized () to complete the
initialization.
functions.threadSafety: It is safe to call this function from any thread.
functions.version: This function is available since SDL 3.2.0.

functions.name: SDL_ShouldQuit
functions.packageDescription: النواة الأساسية لـ SDL3 وتشمل إدارة النافذة والإدخال والأحداث والصوت والربط مع واجهات الرسوميات مثل Vulkan.
functions.description: Return whether cleanup should be done.

parameters.name: state
parameters.description: the initialization state to check.

functions.returns: (bool) Returns true if cleanup needs to be done, false otherwise.
remarks:
This function checks the passed in state and if cleanup should be
done, sets the status to SDL_INIT_STATUS_UNINITIALIZING
and returns true.

If this function returns true, the calling code must call SDL_SetInitialized () to complete the
cleanup.
functions.threadSafety: It is safe to call this function from any thread.
functions.version: This function is available since SDL 3.2.0.

functions.name: SDL_ShowAndroidToast
functions.packageDescription: النواة الأساسية لـ SDL3 وتشمل إدارة النافذة والإدخال والأحداث والصوت والربط مع واجهات الرسوميات مثل Vulkan.
functions.description: Shows an Android toast notification.
functions.syntax: bool SDL_ShowAndroidToast(const char *message, int duration, int gravity, int xoffset, int yoffset);

parameters.name: message
parameters.description: text message to be shown.

parameters.name: duration
parameters.description: 0=short, 1=long.

parameters.name: gravity
parameters.description: where the notification should appear on the screen.

parameters.name: xoffset
parameters.description: set this parameter only when gravity >=0.

parameters.name: yoffset
parameters.description: set this parameter only when gravity >=0.

functions.returns: (bool) Returns true on success or false on failure; call SDL_GetError () for more information.
remarks:
Toasts are a sort of lightweight notification that are unique to
Android.
https://developer.android.com/guide/topics/ui/notifiers/toasts
Shows toast in UI thread.

For the gravity parameter, choose a value from here, or
-1 if you don't have a preference:
https://developer.android.com/reference/android/view/Gravity
functions.threadSafety: It is safe to call this function from any thread.
functions.version: This function is available since SDL 3.2.0.

functions.packageDescription: النواة الأساسية لـ SDL3 وتشمل إدارة النافذة والإدخال والأحداث والصوت والربط مع واجهات الرسوميات مثل Vulkan.
functions.description: Show the cursor.
functions.returns: (bool) Returns true on success or false on failure; call SDL_GetError () for more information.

functions.name: SDL_ShowFileDialogWithProperties
functions.packageDescription: النواة الأساسية لـ SDL3 وتشمل إدارة النافذة والإدخال والأحداث والصوت والربط مع واجهات الرسوميات مثل Vulkan.
functions.description: Create and launch a file dialog with the specified properties.
functions.syntax: void SDL_ShowFileDialogWithProperties(SDL_FileDialogType type, SDL_DialogFileCallback callback, void *userdata, SDL_PropertiesID props);

parameters.name: type
parameters.description: the type of file dialog.

parameters.name: callback
parameters.description:
a function pointer to be invoked when the user selects a file and
accepts, or cancels the dialog, or an error occurs.

parameters.name: userdata
parameters.description:
an optional pointer to pass extra data to the callback when it will
be invoked.

parameters.name: props
parameters.description: the properties to use.

remarks: These are the supported properties:

SDL_PROP_FILE_DIALOG_FILTERS_POINTER :
a pointer to a list of SDL_DialogFileFilter structs, which
will be used as filters for file-based selections. Ignored if the dialog
is an "Open Folder" dialog. If non-NULL, the array of filters must
remain valid at least until the callback is invoked.

SDL_PROP_FILE_DIALOG_NFILTERS_NUMBER :
the number of filters in the array of filters, if it exists.

SDL_PROP_FILE_DIALOG_WINDOW_POINTER :
the window that the dialog should be modal for.

SDL_PROP_FILE_DIALOG_LOCATION_STRING :
the default folder or file to start the dialog at.

SDL_PROP_FILE_DIALOG_MANY_BOOLEAN :
true to allow the user to select more than one entry.

SDL_PROP_FILE_DIALOG_TITLE_STRING :
the title for the dialog.

SDL_PROP_FILE_DIALOG_ACCEPT_STRING :
the label that the accept button should have.

SDL_PROP_FILE_DIALOG_CANCEL_STRING :
the label that the cancel button should have.

Note that each platform may or may not support any of the
properties.
functions.threadSafety:
This function should be called only from the main thread. The
callback may be invoked from the same thread or from a different one,
depending on the OS's constraints.
functions.version: This function is available since SDL 3.2.0.

functions.name: SDL_ShowMessageBox
functions.packageDescription: النواة الأساسية لـ SDL3 وتشمل إدارة النافذة والإدخال والأحداث والصوت والربط مع واجهات الرسوميات مثل Vulkan.
functions.description: Create a modal message box.

parameters.name: messageboxdata
parameters.description:
the SDL_MessageBoxData
structure with title, text and other options.

parameters.name: buttonid
parameters.description: the pointer to which user id of hit button should be copied.

functions.returns: (bool) Returns true on success or false on failure; call SDL_GetError () for more information.
remarks: If your needs aren't complex, it might be easier to use SDL_ShowSimpleMessageBox .

This function should be called on the thread that created the parent
window, or on the main thread if the messagebox has no parent. It will
block execution of that thread until the user clicks a button or closes
the messagebox.

This function may be called at any time, even before SDL_Init (). This makes it useful for reporting
errors like a failure to create a renderer or OpenGL context.

On X11, SDL rolls its own dialog box with X11 primitives instead of a
formal toolkit like GTK+ or Qt.

Note that if SDL_Init () would fail
because there isn't any available video target, this function is likely
to fail for the same reasons. If this is a concern, check the return
value from this function and fall back to writing to stderr if you
can.
functions.threadSafety: This function should only be called on the main thread.
functions.version: This function is available since SDL 3.2.0.

functions.name: SDL_ShowOpenFileDialog
functions.packageDescription: النواة الأساسية لـ SDL3 وتشمل إدارة النافذة والإدخال والأحداث والصوت والربط مع واجهات الرسوميات مثل Vulkan.
functions.description:
Displays a dialog that lets the user select a file on their
filesystem.
functions.syntax: void SDL_ShowOpenFileDialog(SDL_DialogFileCallback callback, void *userdata, SDL_Window *window, const SDL_DialogFileFilter *filters, int nfilters, const char *default_location, bool allow_many);

parameters.name: callback
parameters.description:
a function pointer to be invoked when the user selects a file and
accepts, or cancels the dialog, or an error occurs.

parameters.name: userdata
parameters.description:
an optional pointer to pass extra data to the callback when it will
be invoked.

parameters.name: window
parameters.description:
the window that the dialog should be modal for, may be NULL. Not all
platforms support this option.

parameters.name: filters
parameters.description:
a list of filters, may be NULL. See the [ SDL_DialogFileFilter ]( SDL_DialogFileFilter #code-examples)
documentation for examples]. Not all platforms support this option, and
platforms that do support it may allow the user to ignore the filters.
If non-NULL, it must remain valid at least until the callback is
invoked.

parameters.name: nfilters
parameters.description: the number of filters. Ignored if filters is NULL.

parameters.name: default_location
parameters.description:
the default folder or file to start the dialog at, may be NULL. Not
all platforms support this option.

parameters.name: allow_many
parameters.description:
if non-zero, the user will be allowed to select multiple entries.
Not all platforms support this option.

remarks:
This is an asynchronous function; it will return immediately, and the
result will be passed to the callback.

The callback will be invoked with a null-terminated list of files the
user chose. The list will be empty if the user canceled the dialog, and
it will be NULL if an error occurred.

Note that the callback may be called from a different thread than the
one the function was invoked on.

Depending on the platform, the user may be allowed to input paths
that don't yet exist.

On Linux, dialogs may require XDG Portals, which requires DBus, which
requires an event-handling loop. Apps that do not use SDL to handle
events should add a call to SDL_PumpEvents in their main loop.
functions.threadSafety:
This function should be called only from the main thread. The
callback may be invoked from the same thread or from a different one,
depending on the OS's constraints.
functions.version: This function is available since SDL 3.2.0.

functions.name: SDL_ShowOpenFolderDialog
functions.packageDescription: النواة الأساسية لـ SDL3 وتشمل إدارة النافذة والإدخال والأحداث والصوت والربط مع واجهات الرسوميات مثل Vulkan.
functions.description:
Displays a dialog that lets the user select a folder on their
filesystem.
functions.syntax: void SDL_ShowOpenFolderDialog(SDL_DialogFileCallback callback, void *userdata, SDL_Window *window, const char *default_location, bool allow_many);

parameters.name: callback
parameters.description:
a function pointer to be invoked when the user selects a file and
accepts, or cancels the dialog, or an error occurs.

parameters.name: userdata
parameters.description:
an optional pointer to pass extra data to the callback when it will
be invoked.

parameters.name: window
parameters.description:
the window that the dialog should be modal for, may be NULL. Not all
platforms support this option.

parameters.name: default_location
parameters.description:
the default folder or file to start the dialog at, may be NULL. Not
all platforms support this option.

parameters.name: allow_many
parameters.description:
if non-zero, the user will be allowed to select multiple entries.
Not all platforms support this option.

remarks:
This is an asynchronous function; it will return immediately, and the
result will be passed to the callback.

The callback will be invoked with a null-terminated list of files the
user chose. The list will be empty if the user canceled the dialog, and
it will be NULL if an error occurred.

Note that the callback may be called from a different thread than the
one the function was invoked on.

Depending on the platform, the user may be allowed to input paths
that don't yet exist.

On Linux, dialogs may require XDG Portals, which requires DBus, which
requires an event-handling loop. Apps that do not use SDL to handle
events should add a call to SDL_PumpEvents in their main loop.
functions.threadSafety:
This function should be called only from the main thread. The
callback may be invoked from the same thread or from a different one,
depending on the OS's constraints.
functions.version: This function is available since SDL 3.2.0.
